title: HITSLAM Oval Bath Mat Non Slip Anti Mould, 68 x 38 CM Anti Slip Shower Mat for Bathroom , Machine Washable Bubble Bathtub mat with Suction Cups and Drain Holes, Soft on Feet, Clear
features: Non-Slip and Safe: Our non slip shower mat is equipped with 167 strong suction cups, providing a hold on smooth, clean bathtub or shower surfaces. The frosted texture, adorned with small cushioning bubbles, enhances slip resistance, ensuring a safe bathing experience and reducing the risk of slipping or falling in the bathtub.

Premium Quality: Elevate your bathing experience with our anti-slip bath mats crafted from soft PVC material. This oval bathtub mat has a bubble surface design and a luxurious foot massage sensation during showers—perfect for the elderly, babies, and young kids.

Efficient Drainage Holes: This bathroom tub mat features strategically spaced drain holes, facilitating rapid water drainage and ensuring a swift drying process, keeping your tub consistently clean and dry.

Ideal Dimensions: Oval-shaped shower bath mat measure 68 x 38 cm, offering ample coverage in the tub and suitable for most bathtubs. With 8 popular colors to complement various bathroom decor themes, it is the perfect choice for home, gym, or spa use.

Easy to Clean: Simple maintenance with this shower stall floor mat – easily rinse and hang it up to dry in a well-ventilated area. Additionally, the bath mat for tub is conveniently machine washable. Toss it into the machine at any time to keep it looking fresh and well-maintained.

Warm Tip: Shower Grip Mat adheres only to clean, smooth surfaces and is not suitable for non-smooth, textured, or tiled surfaces. Ensure a secure attachment before entering your tub, shower, or other slippery areas. For safety, avoid using bath oils that may cause slipping.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page How is the drainage effect? Our oval shower mat features numerous drainage holes, facilitating water flow. Is it easy to clean? This oval bathtub mat can be rinsed with water or machine washed, just dry it after cleaning. Where can it be used? This oval bathtub mat can be placed inside and outside the tub, as well as in the shower area. Is the grip really strong? This oval bathtub mat has many powerful suction cups to effectively prevent slipping. What is it made of? Our oval bathtub mat is made of soft PVC material.
